description_long: This is a vibrant athletic shoe featuring a predominantly blue synthetic upper with a large white logo on both sides. The shoe is accented with neon yellow laces and lining, as well as pink and multicolored details on the heel and sole. The toe area is reinforced with stitched paneling for durability, while the heel displays a geometric pattern in pink, yellow, and blue. The sole appears to be made of rubber with a textured grip, suitable for indoor or street sports. The overall design is sporty and eye-catching, with a low-cut profile and lightweight construction. The shoe appears clean and in excellent condition, with no visible signs of wear.
description: A colorful, low-cut athletic shoe with a blue upper, neon yellow laces, and pink accents, featuring a large white logo and a textured rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue upper, large white logo, neon yellow laces, and pink/yellow heel details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded, padded toe, neon yellow laces, and blue upper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the white logo, blue upper, and multicolored heel pattern visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the pink and multicolored geometric heel design and neon yellow lining.
attribute_logo: Large white 'J' logo on both sides of the shoe, pink geometric logo on the heel.
